title.en: What the MAC Promises: Services, Functional Models and the MAC Data Service
title.zh: MAC 的承诺：服务、功能模型与 MAC 数据服务

blocks.en: Before any 802.11 frame format or backoff timer makes sense, you need the mental model of what the MAC sublayer actually promises to deliver. The standard frames this as a catalog of services: a STA does not just "send packets," it invokes named services that move MSDUs (MAC Service Data Units) between MAC entities, control who is allowed on the link, protect the data, manage spectrum, prioritize traffic, reach external networks, and broadcast efficiently. This lesson is a coverage map: we walk the service catalog of clause 4.5, the two RSNA functional models of clause 4.10, and then the MAC data service interface itself in clause 5.2, closing with how the DS hands MSDUs around in clause 7.
blocks.zh: 在理解任何 802.11 帧格式或退避计时器之前，你需要先建立一个心智模型：MAC 子层到底承诺交付什么。标准把这一切归纳为一份服务清单——STA 并不是简单地“发包”，而是调用一组有名字的服务，用来在 MAC 实体之间搬运 MSDU（MAC 服务数据单元）、控制谁能接入链路、保护数据、管理频谱、区分流量优先级、接入外部网络以及高效广播。本课是一张覆盖地图：我们先走一遍 4.5 节的服务清单，再看 4.10 节的两种 RSNA 功能模型，然后进入 5.2 节的 MAC 数据服务接口本身，最后用第 7 节收尾，说明分发系统如何在各方之间传递 MSDU。

blocks.en: The first and most fundamental service is distribution of MSDUs within a DS (4.5.2). When a non-GLK STA sends a frame through an ESS, the input AP hands a MAC service tuple (the MSDU plus its parameters) to the distribution system service (DSS), which delivers it to the output AP serving the destination. The standard deliberately does NOT specify how the DS does this internally — only that 802.11 must give the DS enough information, supplied by the association services, to find the correct output point. Two sub-functions sit alongside distribution: Integration (4.5.2.2), where the output point is a portal bridging to a non-802.11 integrated LAN with any needed media/address translation, and QoS traffic scheduling (4.5.2.3), where a scheduling entity picks frames from per-TID queues under the HCF for intra-BSS QoS transfer.
blocks.zh: 最基本、最核心的服务是 DS 内的 MSDU 分发（4.5.2）。当一个非 GLK STA 通过 ESS 发送帧时，输入 AP 把一个 MAC 服务元组（MSDU 加上它的参数）交给分发系统服务（DSS），由 DSS 将其投递到为目的地服务的输出 AP。标准刻意不规定 DS 内部如何完成这一过程——它只要求 802.11 向 DS 提供足够的信息（由关联类服务提供），让 DS 能找到正确的输出点。分发之外还有两个子功能：集成（4.5.2.2），此时输出点是一个门户（portal），它桥接到非 802.11 的集成 LAN，并完成所需的介质/地址转换；以及 QoS 流量调度（4.5.2.3），由调度实体在 HCF 下从各 TID 队列中选取帧，实现 BSS 内的 QoS 传输。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  S1[STA 1] -->|MSDU| AP_in[Input AP]
  AP_in -->|MAC service tuple| DS[(Distribution System)]
  DS --> AP_out[Output AP]
  AP_out -->|MSDU| S4[STA 4]
  DS --> P[Portal] --> EXT[Non-802.11 LAN]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  S1[STA 1] -->|MSDU| AP_in[输入 AP]
  AP_in -->|MAC 服务元组| DS[(分发系统)]
  DS --> AP_out[输出 AP]
  AP_out -->|MSDU| S4[STA 4]
  DS --> P[门户] --> EXT[非 802.11 LAN]

blocks.en: Distribution only works once the DS knows which AP serves a STA — that knowledge comes from the connectivity-related services (4.5.3). Association provides the STA-to-AP mapping to the DS; a STA is associated with at most one AP at a time, so the DS always has a unique answer to "which AP is serving STA X?". Reassociation moves an existing association from one AP to another for BSS-transition mobility (and can also change association attributes at the same AP). Disassociation voids the mapping and is a notification, not a request — it cannot be refused except when management frame protection is in play and the integrity check fails. For GLK STAs these same services instead create, reconfigure, and tear down point-to-point general links in an 802.1Q bridged network.
blocks.zh: 分发只有在 DS 知道哪个 AP 为某个 STA 服务时才能工作——这一信息来自连接相关服务（4.5.3）。关联向 DS 提供 STA 到 AP 的映射；一个 STA 在任一时刻至多与一个 AP 关联，因此 DS 对“哪个 AP 在为 STA X 服务”始终有唯一答案。重关联把已有关联从一个 AP 迁移到另一个 AP，以支持 BSS 间移动（也可在同一 AP 下变更关联属性）。去关联会作废该映射，它是一种通知而非请求——除非启用了管理帧保护且完整性校验失败，否则不能被拒绝。对于 GLK STA，这些相同的服务转而用于在 802.1Q 桥接网络中创建、重配置和拆除点到点的通用链路。

blocks.en: Because the wireless medium is physically open, the access control and data confidentiality services (4.5.4) restore the security a wired LAN gets for free. Authentication (link-level, a station service) establishes identity — Open System, FT, SAE, FILS, and PASN are the five defined methods — and is a prerequisite for association. Deauthentication terminates it (and so disassociates). Data confidentiality protects frame contents with TKIP/CCMP/GCMP (and BIP variants for management frames); the default state is "in the clear." Key management, data origin authenticity, and replay detection round out an RSNA. In the regulated 5 GHz band the spectrum management services (4.5.5) add Transmit Power Control (TPC) and Dynamic Frequency Selection (DFS) so RLANs respect regulatory power limits and avoid co-channel operation with radar.
blocks.zh: 由于无线介质在物理上是开放的，接入控制与数据机密性服务（4.5.4）用来恢复有线 LAN 天然具备的安全性。鉴权（链路级的、属于站点服务）用于确立身份——已定义的五种方法是开放系统、FT、SAE、FILS 和 PASN——并且是关联的前提。去鉴权会终止鉴权（从而也会去关联）。数据机密性用 TKIP/CCMP/GCMP（管理帧用 BIP 变体）保护帧内容；默认状态是“明文传输”。密钥管理、数据来源真实性和重放检测共同构成完整的 RSNA。在受管制的 5 GHz 频段，频谱管理服务（4.5.5）增加了发射功率控制（TPC）和动态频率选择（DFS），使 RLAN 遵守监管功率上限并避免与雷达同信道工作。

blocks.en: A useful way to read clause 4.5: "station services" (authentication, deauthentication, data confidentiality) live in every STA and concern a single link, while "distribution system services" (association, reassociation, disassociation, distribution, integration) concern how the DS routes MSDUs across an ESS. Association is the bridge between the two — it is the act that lets a STA's station-level link become usable through the DS.
blocks.zh: 阅读 4.5 节的一个实用思路：“站点服务”（鉴权、去鉴权、数据机密性）存在于每个 STA 中，只关乎单条链路；而“分发系统服务”（关联、重关联、去关联、分发、集成）关乎 DS 如何在整个 ESS 范围内路由 MSDU。关联是二者之间的桥梁——正是这一动作让一个 STA 的站点级链路能够通过 DS 被实际使用。

blocks.en: The catalog then climbs toward applications. Traffic differentiation and QoS support (4.5.6) gives differentiated medium access per traffic category and TSPEC, and optionally the QoS Management Frame (QMF) service that lets a STA send some Management frames using an access category other than voice. Interworking with external networks (4.5.9) lets a non-AP STA discover and select networks (via ANQP), perform preassociation discovery (PAD) of services, reach emergency services, and remap layer-3 DSCP marks to over-the-air user priorities via the QoS Map service. Finally, enhanced broadcast services (4.5.12 / EBCS) provide robust broadcast of content — with data origin authenticity — whether or not the receiver is associated, including the EBCS DL traffic-stream mapper and receiver-side filter.
blocks.zh: 随后这份清单逐步向应用层攀升。流量区分与 QoS 支持（4.5.6）按流量类别和 TSPEC 提供差异化的介质接入，并可选地提供 QoS 管理帧（QMF）服务，让 STA 用语音以外的接入类别发送某些管理帧。与外部网络的互通（4.5.9）让非 AP STA 能够（通过 ANQP）发现并选择网络、对服务进行预关联发现（PAD）、接入紧急服务，并通过 QoS Map 服务把三层 DSCP 标记重映射为空口的用户优先级。最后，增强广播服务（4.5.12 / EBCS）提供对内容的稳健广播——并带有数据来源真实性——无论接收方是否已关联，其中包括 EBCS 下行的流映射器与接收端过滤器。

blocks.en: Clause 4.10 zooms into the RSNA functional models — how the security pieces actually wire together. The infrastructure functional model (4.10.3) summarizes RSN setup in three cases: an 802.1X AS used after Open System authentication (the AS authenticates the Supplicant, generates a PMK, ships it to the Authenticator, and a 4-way handshake derives the PTK and installs keys); a password/PSK case using SAE before the 4-way handshake; and an alternate PSK-as-PMK case. It also covers FILS fast link setup, Opportunistic Wireless Encryption, and RSNA disassociation. The IBSS functional model (4.10.4) has no AP and no DS: peers protect individually addressed frames with a per-pair PTK and each STA's group-addressed frames with its own key, distributed via 4-way and group key handshakes — so N supplicants need N(N-1) handshakes.
blocks.zh: 第 4.10 节聚焦 RSNA 功能模型——安全各部分究竟如何连接在一起。基础设施功能模型（4.10.3）按三种情形概述 RSN 建立：在开放系统鉴权之后使用 802.1X AS（AS 鉴权请求方、生成 PMK、通过安全通道发给鉴权方，再由 4 次握手派生 PTK 并安装密钥）；使用口令/PSK 的情形，在 4 次握手前先做 SAE；以及把 PSK 直接作为 PMK 的替代情形。它还涵盖 FILS 快速链路建立、机会式无线加密以及 RSNA 去关联。IBSS 功能模型（4.10.4）没有 AP、也没有 DS：对等方用每对一份的 PTK 保护单播帧，每个 STA 的组播帧用其自有密钥保护，经由 4 次握手和组密钥握手分发——因此 N 个请求方需要 N(N-1) 次握手。

blocks.en: Everything above is described in prose; clause 5.2 is where the MAC data service becomes a concrete interface. The MAC supports three ISO/IEC 8802-2 primitives (5.2.1): MA-UNITDATA.request (LLC asks the MAC to send an MSDU), MA-UNITDATA.indication (the MAC delivers a received MSDU up to LLC), and MA-UNITDATA-STATUS.indication (the MAC reports back why a request did or did not go out). Two specializations exist: the GLK MAC data service (5.2.2) adds a station vector of service_access_point_identifiers (which general links carry the MSDU) and an MSDU format parameter (EPD vs LPD), and the NGV MAC data service (5.2.3) adds a radio environment request vector carrying PPDU format, MCS, channel width and more for ITS/vehicular transmission.
blocks.zh: 上面的一切都是用文字描述的；到了 5.2 节，MAC 数据服务才落实为一个具体的接口。MAC 支持三个 ISO/IEC 8802-2 原语（5.2.1）：MA-UNITDATA.request（LLC 请求 MAC 发送一个 MSDU）、MA-UNITDATA.indication（MAC 把收到的 MSDU 上交给 LLC）以及 MA-UNITDATA-STATUS.indication（MAC 反馈某个请求是否发出及其原因）。它有两种特化：GLK MAC 数据服务（5.2.2）增加了 station vector，即一组 service_access_point_identifier（指明哪些通用链路承载该 MSDU），以及 MSDU 格式参数（EPD 或 LPD）；NGV MAC 数据服务（5.2.3）则增加了 radio environment request vector，为 ITS/车联网传输携带 PPDU 格式、MCS、信道带宽等信息。

summary.en: Coverage map: the three MA-UNITDATA primitives and the clause-7 DS handoff, clause by clause
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：三个 MA-UNITDATA 原语与第 7 节的 DS 交接，逐条对应

blocks.en: MA-UNITDATA.request (5.2.4) carries source/destination address, routing information (which 802.11 fixes to null), data, priority, drop eligible, service class, and — when implemented — station vector, MSDU format, and the radio environment request vector. On receipt the MAC either formats a frame and reports Successful via a STATUS.indication, or discards the request and reports why. MA-UNITDATA.indication (5.2.5) carries the received MSDU up to LLC with SA, DA, reception status, priority, drop eligible, service class, and the GLK/NGV vectors; absent error, the data is logically unchanged from the matching request. MA-UNITDATA-STATUS.indication (5.2.6) has local significance only and returns transmission status enumerations such as Successful, Undeliverable (excessive data length), Undeliverable (non-null source routing), unsupported/unavailable priority or service class, no BSS available, and cannot encrypt with a null key. Clause 7 then specifies the DS SAP: MSDU transfer (7.2.2) defines DS-UNITDATA.request/.indication, which accept and deliver a complete MAC service tuple (all the 5.2.4.2 parameters) into and out of the DS, with a SourceType of SRC_AP / SRC_MESH_GATE / SRC_PORTAL and group-address fan-out rules. Mapping updates (7.2.3) define DS-STA-NOTIFY.request with an ADD/MOVE/DELETE UpdateType so an AP or mesh gate keeps the DS's STA-to-AP and mesh-STA-to-mesh-gate maps current — exactly the mapping that the association/reassociation/disassociation services of 4.5.3 feed.
blocks.zh: MA-UNITDATA.request（5.2.4）携带源/目的地址、路由信息（802.11 固定为 null）、数据、优先级、可丢弃标志、服务类别，以及在实现时携带 station vector、MSDU 格式和 radio environment request vector。收到后，MAC 要么把帧组装好并经由 STATUS.indication 报告 Successful，要么丢弃该请求并报告原因。MA-UNITDATA.indication（5.2.5）把收到的 MSDU 连同 SA、DA、接收状态、优先级、可丢弃标志、服务类别以及 GLK/NGV 向量一并上交给 LLC；在无错误时，数据与对应请求在逻辑上保持不变。MA-UNITDATA-STATUS.indication（5.2.6）只有本地意义，返回传输状态枚举，如 Successful、不可投递（数据过长）、不可投递（源路由非空）、不支持/不可用的优先级或服务类别、无可用 BSS、以及无法用空密钥加密等。随后第 7 节规定 DS SAP：MSDU 传输（7.2.2）定义 DS-UNITDATA.request/.indication，把一个完整的 MAC 服务元组（5.2.4.2 的全部参数）送入和送出 DS，并带有 SourceType（SRC_AP / SRC_MESH_GATE / SRC_PORTAL）以及组播扇出规则。映射更新（7.2.3）定义 DS-STA-NOTIFY.request，带 ADD/MOVE/DELETE 的 UpdateType，使 AP 或网格网关让 DS 的 STA-到-AP 映射和网格 STA-到-网格网关映射保持最新——这正是 4.5.3 的关联/重关联/去关联服务所馈送的那个映射。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 250" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="30" y="20" width="170" height="40"/><text x="115" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">LLC / bridge port</text><line x1="70" y1="60" x2="70" y2="100"/><text x="40" y="85" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">.request</text><line x1="160" y1="100" x2="160" y2="60"/><text x="165" y="85" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">.indication</text><rect x="30" y="100" width="170" height="40"/><text x="115" y="125" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">MAC (MA-UNITDATA)</text><line x1="200" y1="120" x2="260" y2="120"/><text x="230" y="112" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">tuple</text><rect x="260" y="100" width="170" height="40"/><text x="345" y="125" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">DS SAP (DS-UNITDATA)</text><line x1="345" y1="140" x2="345" y2="180"/><rect x="260" y="180" width="170" height="40"/><text x="345" y="205" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Distribution System</text><line x1="345" y1="180" x2="345" y2="160"/><text x="352" y="165" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">DS-STA-NOTIFY</text></svg>

caption.en: The MSDU's journey: LLC drives the MAC via MA-UNITDATA primitives (clause 5.2); the AP then hands the MAC service tuple into the DS via DS-UNITDATA and keeps the DS's mapping current via DS-STA-NOTIFY (clause 7.2).
caption.zh: MSDU 的旅程：LLC 通过 MA-UNITDATA 原语驱动 MAC（5.2 节）；AP 再通过 DS-UNITDATA 把 MAC 服务元组交给 DS，并通过 DS-STA-NOTIFY 维护 DS 的映射（7.2 节）。
